1,624 Tokyo restaurant locations • Burger, Family & Teishoku chains
Parameters
min_cluster_size 10
Minimum points to form a cluster. Higher → fewer, larger clusters.
550
min_samples 3
Density threshold for core points. Higher → stricter density, more noise.
120

Cluster Breakdown
How HDBSCAN Works
1
Mutual Reachability — Pairwise distances scaled by local density so sparse regions appear farther apart.
2
Minimum Spanning Tree — Graph connecting all points by shortest mutual-reachability edges.
3
Cluster Hierarchy — Progressively removes long edges, forming a dendrogram of nested clusters.
4
Condensed Tree — Prunes clusters smaller than min_cluster_size from the hierarchy.
5
Cluster Extraction — Selects stable clusters. Points that don't fit are labeled noise (−1).
Legend
Noise / Outlier (label = −1)
Cluster (each gets a unique color)
